query: SELECT mg.id, mg.title, mg.audioUrl, ss.jobId, ss.status FROM music_generations mg LEFT JOIN stem_splits ss ON mg.id = ss.trackId WHERE ss.id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ss.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2NoQxNASu25QqFj.root --database frNnwU2pwLKJifDR8KqR7c --execute SELECT mg.id, mg.title, mg.audioUrl, ss.jobId, ss.status FROM music_generations mg LEFT JOIN stem_splits ss ON mg.id = ss.trackId WHERE ss.id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ss.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
